sourceAmbiguity: Task 200 published a temporary contact-visibility seam while receipt/status parity was missing.
decisionTaken: Consumed the same-shell repair and blocked-path posture as a mapped recovery outcome in ReceiptOutcomeBridge.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Contact repair remains a recovery posture without changing receipt/status grammar.
operationalRisk: Future contact repair surfaces could emit a separate status vocabulary.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Keep contact repair as recoveryPosture=contact_repair_required with the same status strip grammar.
